public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as public herald.
manner: Reads as a functional local operator shaped by place, duty, and the practical customs around them. In Psanan, that reads as someone heat-forged, direct, and honor-conscious, shaped by household authority and volcanic endurance, and the habits of a public herald still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of public herald in and around Descent Charter Compacts, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Descent Charter Compacts workable through the obligations of public herald while managing the immediate pressure of eruption risk in Psanan.
hidden_pressure: Must keep their piece of the world working while larger systems push stress downward. Around Descent Charter Compacts, that usually means carrying eruption risk, resource access, underworld danger without letting the role of public herald visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Getting involved with Soryn Glassmelt can expose the party to the everyday consequences of pressure that others only discuss in the abstract.
Soryn Glassmelt can offer grounded local knowledge once the party proves it is useful rather than merely curious.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained.
public_signal: Soryn Glassmelt carries the look of a practiced local operator whose authority is read through place, familiarity, and the reactions of others more than formal insignia.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Descent Charter Compacts: the part of Descent Charter Compacts where their work actually matters day to day
who_avoids_them: those who only appear when things break
